releaseSummary: Lead Finder now degrades gracefully when the `lead-intelligence` Edge Function cannot be reached.
Users receive a clear in-page warning and non-crashing diagnostics state instead of repeated fatal runtime failure behavior.
Search action now catches unexpected failures and reports a controlled toast error.

moduleImpact.notes: Updated as part of Admin E2E Runtime Hardening (Lead Finder graceful fallback).
Updated as part of Admin E2E Runtime Hardening (Lead Finder graceful fallback).

migrationNotes: No manual data migration is required for this release.
